title: PixelBlades
description:
attempt at creating somewhat cool looking 32x32 tools in minecraft.
from wooden tools all the way to netherite.
body:
# PixelBlades
![Preview of some items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be47e6d7dd7485fd96bbc8e7bbe552bf801cd9f7.png)

My attempt at creating somewhat cool looking tools in minecraft.
The resolution mainly used in this resource pack is 32x32.

This resourse pack aims to change most of the weapons and tools in the game, giving them a unique and 3D look.


 **Affected items:**
- Netherite, diamond, gold, iron, stone, and wooden tools.
- Buckets: Empty, Water, Lava, milk, powdered snow, and all the fish buckets.
- Diamond (item).


 **Note:** This resource pack is still in early stages and models/textures are subject to change drastically


This is my first official resource, so if you have any ideas you want to share or encounter any issues and want to report, you can **dm me on instagram: [@mr.payy](https://www.instagram.com/mr.payy/)**

### **Check out my other Resource packs**

[![PixelBlades 2D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b973dbee0739aa12b14bbccea286938b899105.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/pixelblades2d) [![PixelBladesPBR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22caf91efa87ee84c7155c85ece7f2759b78861c_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/pixelblades-pbr-addon)

## Terms of use:
By downloading, installing, or using this resource pack, you agree to the terms stated below. These conditions apply to usage, distribution, modification, and rights related to the assets contained in this resource pack.


The most current and updated version of these terms is published on the official [CurseForge/Modrinth] page.



- You may:
   - Use this pack in public content (e.g., YouTube videos, livestreams, screenshots), with credit preferred.
   - Modify the pack for personal use only. Do not publish or share modified versions.
   - Include the unmodified pack in server modpacks or distributions with clear credit and a direct link to the original source.
   - Reference the pack in blog posts or social media, as long as proper credit is provided and no files are directly hosted elsewhere.



- You may not:
  - Reupload or redistribute this resource pack on any website, platform, launcher, or hosting service.
  - Share modified versions of the pack, including partial edits or extracted assets, without permission.
  - Use this pack or its contents in paid projects, monetized mods, or paywalled servers.
  - Port or convert this pack or any portion of its assets to Minecraft Bedrock Edition or other games.
